# jamfschool_app (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up a Jamf School app by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "jamfschool_app" "example" {
  id = 1
}

output "app_name" {
  value = data.jamfschool_app.example.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) Unique identifier.

### Read-Only

- `adam_id` (Number) Adam ID (App Store ID).
- `bundle_id` (String) Bundle identifier.
- `name` (String) App name.
- `platform` (String) Platform.
- `vendor` (String) Vendor.
- `version` (String) Version.
